win_condition: After the final sun revolution and final scoring, the player with the highest total points wins.
tiebreaker: If tied, tied player with the most remaining sun points wins; if still tied, tied player with the most seeds/trees on board wins; if still tied, shared victory.

categories.label: Collected Scoring Tokens
categories.description: Points from harvested large trees based on token values taken from soil stacks.

categories.label: Remaining Sun Points Conversion
categories.description: Convert leftover sun points to VP during final scoring per rulebook conversion.
